title: Lightly Garlicy Mediterranean Poppy Seeds Bowl
description: A light, garlicky, and nutritious bowl featuring ground poppy seeds, quinoa, and roasted vegetables. Perfect for meal prep and suitable for breakfast, lunch, or dinner.
instructions: Cook the quinoa according to package instructions using 2 cups of water. Rinse and set aside.
Toss the eggplant, red bell pepper, and zucchini with olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet. Roast for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked quinoa, roasted vegetables, crumbled feta cheese, ground poppy seeds, mixed greens, green olives, and red onion.
Drizzle with lemon juice and toss to combine. Top with minced garlic and serve hot or cold.
Store in the refrigerator for up to 5 days or freeze for up to 3 months.
Adjust seasoning as needed before serving.
